meta.title: Driver App with GPS for Delivery Services — Live Tracking & Route Planning | Gastro Master
meta.description: Gastro Master's driver app: live GPS tracking, route optimisation, push notifications and offline mode. For pizzerias, delivery services & restaurants. Saves up to 2 hours per driver per day.

hero.headline: Driver App with GPS — Track Every Delivery in Your POS
hero.subline: Live GPS tracking, optimised routes and push notifications in one app. Your team delivers faster, your customers see the driver in real time — and you save up to 2 hours per driver per day.

problem.title: The Problem with Classic Delivery Services
points: Drivers plan their own routes — detours, duplicate trips, cold pizza at the customer's door. Delivery costs are unnecessarily high due to inefficient routes.
Drivers take breaks on your dime — you have no control over your team's efficiency and workload.
Dispatching via paper or WhatsApp. Errors, misunderstandings, lost orders.

solution.title: The Solution: Driver App with GPS
points: Automatic route planning — the app bundles orders and optimises the sequence.
Customer sees the driver live on the map. No follow-up calls, less support effort.
Clear assignment: Every delivery is assigned to the driver. Security for restaurant and driver. No dispute over earned pay.

features.headline: Everything You Need for a Delivery Service That Truly Scales
features.sub: Eight features that turn your team into a well-oiled delivery machine.

items.title: Live GPS Tracking
items.description: Every driver in real time on the map — for dispatching, the customer and reporting. Accuracy down to a few metres.

items.title: Route Optimisation
items.description: Multiple orders are automatically bundled by direction. Up to 30% fewer kilometres per tour.

items.title: Turn-by-Turn Navigation
items.description: Built-in navigation with Google Maps — driver navigates with the proven mapping solution.

items.title: Driver Dispatching
items.description: Dispatcher sees all drivers, their routes and workload on a central dashboard. Full control over your team.

items.title: Transparent Driver Accounting
items.description: Mileage reimbursement, order fees and hourly wages are recorded individually per driver and calculated automatically. Clear accounting in the evening — no disputes.

items.title: WhatsApp Notifications
items.description: Drivers receive an instant WhatsApp message when a new delivery is ready. Fast, reliable communication — no one misses an order.

useCases.headline: How Restaurateurs Use the Driver App
useCases.sub: Three real scenarios from our customer base — from the family delivery service to the multi-location chain.

items.title: Pizzeria with 3 Drivers
items.story: A Munich pizzeria uses the driver app. Result: 20% more orders per evening — because drivers run more efficient tours and customers cancel less often.

items.title: Multi-Location Business
items.story: A delivery service with multiple locations activates the driver app and receives a separate access for each location. Centralized control of all drivers and locations on one dashboard — perfect for growth without complexity.

items.title: Bicycle Courier in the City Centre
items.story: A veggie delivery service in Berlin-Mitte uses e-bikes. The GPS app optimises routes via cycle paths — drivers complete 6 instead of 4 deliveries per hour, without the stress.

pricing.headline: Pricing & Availability
pricing.note: POS add-on for businesses with their own delivery service. Billed per active driver account per month, plus VAT. Includes real-time GPS tracking, automatic route optimisation and dispatching overview directly in the POS system — no fees per delivery or per kilometre driven.

appDownload.headline: Download the Driver App for Free
appDownload.sub: The app runs on any iOS or Android smartphone — no new device needed. Log in, see the route, start delivering.

internalLinks.headline: Works Perfectly With
internalLinks.intro: The driver app unfolds its full potential as part of the Gastro Master ecosystem — from the first click to handover at the front door.

items.title: POS System
items.description: Orders go directly from the POS system into the driver app — no manual assignment, no paperwork.

items.title: Delivery Service Solution
items.description: Complete package of webshop, POS, driver app and dispatcher dashboard — specifically for pizza, sushi and burger delivery services.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions about the Driver App with GPS
faq.sub: Answers to the questions we receive most often from delivery services across Germany and the DACH region.

items.q: What does the driver app cost for my restaurant?
items.a: The driver app with GPS is a POS add-on and costs €10 per month per active driver (plus VAT). Includes real-time GPS tracking, automatic route optimisation and dispatching overview directly in the POS system. No additional fees per delivery or per kilometre driven — you only pay for actually active drivers.

items.q: Which devices does the driver app run on?
items.a: The app runs on all current iOS and Android smartphones. No special device needed — drivers can use their personal phone. iOS 14+ or Android 9+ is recommended so that GPS tracking and push notifications work reliably.

items.q: How accurate is the GPS tracking?
items.a: The live GPS is accurate to within a few metres and updates the driver's position every 5–15 seconds (depending on network quality and battery settings). All orders land centrally in the driver app — whether they come from Lieferando, Wolt, Uber Eats or directly from Gastro Master. One system for all platforms.

items.q: How is the driver app connected to my POS system?
items.a: If you already use a Gastro Master POS system, the driver app is immediately ready to use — orders land automatically in the app as soon as they are marked as 'delivery' at the till. No separate setup, no integration, no developers needed.

items.q: Can I see how many kilometres my drivers have covered?
items.a: Yes. In the dispatcher dashboard you'll find detailed reports per driver, per shift and per delivery: kilometres, travel time and number of deliveries. Ideal for payroll, bonus systems and cost control.
Yes. The driver app is fully GDPR-compliant. Location data is only captured during active shifts and deleted or anonymised at the end of the shift. Data processing takes place on German servers.
